		<script>
document.addEventListener( 'wpcf7mailsent', function( event ) {
	var inputs = event.detail.inputs;
	var	label = "";

    for ( var i = 0; i < inputs.length; i++ ) {
        if ( 'wpcf7conversion' == inputs[i].name ) {
			label = inputs[i].value;
            break;
        }
    }
	
	gtag('event', 'send', {
	  'event_category': 'Contact Form',
	  'event_action': 'submit',
	  'event_label': label
	});
}, false );
</script>
